entry.title: Re: Tax code not editable when invoicing outbound deliver...
entry.content:
When there is a down payment assigned, the tax information is not editable in new invoice.

This is the current system behavior as designed. If you would like to change the tax information in new invoice, you may invoice the invoice request without down payment assignment.

reference KBAs:  

  • 2408717 - When Invoicing an Invoice Request, Tax Code is Not Editable if Down Payment is Assigned 
  • 2809206 - How To Work With Down Payments in Sales

entry.title: Re: New Jersey SAP Community 1st Meet in 2025
entry.content: The SAP community meet was a great learning experience, providing deep insights into cross-functional integration, the latest trends, and real-world implementation strategies. Discussions on system conversion, data migration, AI/ML, and the digital twin concept were particularly insightful. Thanks to the organizers, @Suresh_Sadhu, for facilitating such a valuable and enriching event!

entry.title: *** ERROR => Connect to database failed, rc=1, rcSQL=10 when starting applicatiion server
entry.content:
Hello,

This is coming from a new installation in AWS to get rid of our last on premise Sandbox environment. The aws system was installed with the same system ID for the application server (SS1) and Hana Server (SH1) with hosts names being different. After the installation was completed I was able to login in client 000 using DDIC

A backup of the on premise Sandbox was done and used for the restore of the AWS System. The default schema of the new barebone aws was SAPHANADB and was replaced with the schema SAPABAP1 from the source backup. The Profiles were adjusted to reflect the change.

After investigating the the error I used the hdbuserstore command to delete the existing Key and created a new one with the following command

hdbuserstore SET sbox "<AWS Host Name>.local:30015@SH1" SAPABAP1 <password for user SAPABAP1>

After rebooting the application server I started the instance and eventually the dispatcher service would go gray

Although I ran the hdbuserstore the trace would show the same error:

C connect to SAPHANADB/<pwd>@<AWS Host Name>.local:30015 on connection 0 ...
C *** ERROR => Connect to database failed, rc=1, rcSQL=10

For some  reason it is still picking up the old connection string of the original schema before the restore. I'm not sure where it's getting it from. I have looked at bunch of notes but to no avail. Any help would be great.

Thank you

entry.title: Wily Introscope セキュアストア の保護の機能について
entry.content:
担当者様
平素よりお世話になっております。

上記URLにある PSE の保護 など、AS ABAP の Tr-cd：STRUST で提供される「PSE の保護の機能は、Wily Introscope でも提供されているのでしょうか。
もし提供されているならば、設定方法など記載されたSAPノートやSAPヘルプをご教授頂けないでしょうか。

以上、よろしくお願い致します。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Wily Introscope セキュアストア の保護の機能について
entry.content:
ご管理者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

Introscope EMは管理対象システムの監視データを収集するために、
Solution Managerの一部として使用されるサードパーティーソフトウェアです。

Introscopeランドスケープでは、ABAPシステムの監視データを収集することができますが（ホスト・OS情報など）、
監視対象システムのPSEファイルを管理する機能はありません。
PSEファイルに対する保護機能はWily Introscopeには提供されません。
恐れ入りますが、ご了承のほどよろしくお願いいたします。

以上、よろしくお願いします。
Haterm

entry.title: Re: How to get the total number of data point comments in...
entry.content: Transport of comment is not supported for now.

entry.title: Re: Change the Functional Location of Equipment within th...
entry.content: Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Change the Functional Location of Equipment within th...
entry.content: Thank you : ) !

entry.title: Re: Fiori & CAP: getting custom action working
entry.content:
Hi,

Fiori elements OData V4 offers 3 kinds of actions - "bound" which are bound to specific instance, "unbound" which are not related to any instance and "static" - which are bound to the table entity itself and not to the specific selections within. 

In your case, you are looking for a table action that I assume should operate only on the selected rows of the table - if so you need a "bound" action defined at table level. This then needs to have an Action Parameter Dialog configured to allow user to enter the title. The backend could then return the updated instance so that the table is updated with the response.

Please read through the V4 specific sections "Bound and Unbound Actions" and "Action Parameters" in page for more information.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Managing IUID or UII in SAP EWM
entry.content: Thank you very much for your sharing.

entry.title: Re: In custom uploader there is no option to add the sect...
entry.content:
Thank you for your query. The Section Code feature has been added in the CE2508 release. After upgrading to CE2508, you will be able to use this field in the API.
If you have any further questions, please feel free to reach out.

entry.title: Re: Unable to call subsequent SOAP API in S/4 HANA Public...
entry.content: Thank you for your query. To the best of my knowledge, the Journal Entry SOAP APIs do not utilize the class CL_WS_PROXY_RUNTIME_OUTBOUND for outbound services. Could you please elaborate further on your use case? If you have any additional context or details, it would help us better understand your situation.

entry.title: Re: Problem in using the enhancement SAPLV01Z for batch no assignement in MIGO
entry.content: What was the last way you resolved it, please and thank you!

entry.title: getting errors user not allowed to backup encrypted databases other then SA login. pl advise alterna
entry.content:
on ASE 1.0 I have performed below for database encryption with SA login.  Successfully able to dump and load databases on source/target with SA login. When tried with non-sa login which with oper_role, getting error

use master
go
create encryption key master with passwd "xyzpassword"
go
set encryption passwd 'xyzpassword' for key master
go
create encryption key dbkey for database encryption
go

alter database db1 encrypt with dbkey

with sa login - WORKS  able to dump db1 from source and refresh to target.

Error - with user login with oper_role, getting error user xx not allowed to dump encrypted db, has to be a db_owner.

 

Also, does the transaction logs has to be on hold while the encryption is in progress.

Any brief document, listing the steps is very helpful.

entry.title: How to Track Approval Details of Maintenance Requests
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Based on business roles & business catalog, we can determine which users have the authority to approve or reject maintenance requests.

However, when using the "Screen Maintenance Requests" app, it seems that we can only approve or reject requests, but there is no visible approval history or details (e.g., which users have approved the requests).

Is there any way to check this information? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA Dimension
entry.content: Hi @abalasescu2, the dimension value depends on when it is appear in the employee record. I am not sure how this custom dimension is sourced. Is it directly from a field in the Job Info table? If this come from Job Info table, then the new dimension value will appear from effective start date value of the record. You may want to check if you have configure Job Info table correctly, e.g. there should be sequence number setup because of multiple records on the same day. Also you mentioned the event happened on 1 November 2024 but you checked headcount in 2025. Is there a new record after 1 Nov 2024 that change the dimension value back? My suggestion is to pull all records for this employee and then compare against the logic in WFA on HANA. Thank you.

1) What is the difference between these two?

2) I want to know the maximum size of the Kibana logs. What capacity does this refer to? OpenSearch Disk Capacity or Net Availability Capacity?

entry.title: Re: SAP Hana Express licence with more than 32GB
entry.content: Hi akuller, SAP HANA Express Edition supports a maximum memory capacity of up to 32 GB. For more details, please refer to the following link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_EXPRESS_EDITION/32e387b229ec4ec0bbfdcd200af0ac5b/68b3c27e3d0649a09e2160e0d4f3d3c5.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=2.0.070 If you require more than 32 GB of memory, you will need to purchase a license for the SAP HANA Platform Edition. Additional information can be found here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/6b94445c94ae495c83a19646e7c3fd56/9fd02a6c45eb485b9b3b0bc845586a6a.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=2.0.08 Best regards, Charles

entry.title: Re: SAP Hana Express licence with more than 32GB
entry.content:
Hi akuller,

SAP HANA Express Edition supports a maximum memory capacity of up to 32 GB. For more details, please refer to the following link:
HANA Express Edition Documentation

If you require more than 32 GB of memory, you will need to purchase a license for the SAP HANA Platform Edition. Additional information can be found here:
SAP HANA Platform Edition Documentation

Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: How to Consume string variable created in r visualiation into SAC script ?
entry.content: getNumber(key: string): is also available for Input parameter. Just check if you are able to fetch the number parameter using this method. Then it will point whether its the Inputparamater class or Environmentvalue is problem

entry.title: Re: Possible to Apply Filter on All on Multiple Data Models?
entry.content:
Hi @inepre1 ,

To ensure the Page filter functions correctly across all widgets created from different data models, the models must be linked (by a common dimension) as shown in the attached screenshot.

Regards,

Subbu

entry.content:
Hello @AmanVarshney ,

Thank you for the detailed blog.

It's very helpful.

entry.title: Re: Logs: What is the difference between "OpenSearch Disk...
entry.content:
For Question #1, I do not know the answer. I assume this is the total capacity of the OpenSearch or Logging service and that "Net Availability Capacity" is just a subset of "OpenSearch Disk Capacity".

For Question #2, SAP KBA 3446887 (Retention Policy for Logs in OpenSearch and Blob Storage) partially clarifies this. The answer is more or less "Net Availability Capacity". Excerpt from SAP KBA:

  • The logs are achieving the maximum space determined on retention policy.
    • For Production and Stage environments: 200GB space for logs (+ 200Gb for replicas) with 75% retention policy, which gives about 150Gb of space for logs.
    • For Development environments: 150GB space for logs (+ 150Gb for replicas) with 75% retention policy, which gives about 112.5Gb of space for logs.

entry.title: Cannot access the SAP for Me system using the user: suwat@berlinpharm.com
entry.content:
Cannot access the SAP for Me

Then, a "Forget Password" request was sent to the email *, but no email was received. The inbox, junk, and spam folders were checked, but there was no email from SAP ID Service idservice@notifications.sap.com. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cannot access the SAP for Me system using the user: s...
entry.content:
Regarding to your issue, please refer to KBA 1808560 - How to reset a S-User ID password - SAP for Me

Tips: Please enter the S-user ID instead of email address when resetting password.

If this S-user still could not receive the password reset email, please send an email to sso@sap.com then the responsible team will send an email manually to this S-user.

Detail information please refer to KBA 3053832 - How to contact SAP ID Service team for password and login assistance for SAP sites

entry.title: SAP AI CodeJams in Kolkata
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Kolkata,

The SAP Developer Advocates are coming again to your city in the first week of March to conduct AI CodeJams as part of India AI Roadshow. The events are kindly hosted by Capgemini Technology Services India Ltd. and few seats are left. More details about these events and how to sign up are available in the links below.

Mar 4th

Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (10 seats left)

Mar 5th

Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (5 seats left)

Thank you.

  2. Need access to create /register application within entra.
  3. Need access to create technical users/groups

entry.title: Re: PO with Alternate UOM and Stock Report with Alternate...
entry.content: Thank you for the info. We had maintained conversion 150 M2 = 100 KG in ME11. Also as system had asked for conversion while creating the material master, we had maintained 1 KG = 1 M2. After GR, in the MMBE it is showing as 66.6 KG and 66.6 M2 (instead of 66.6 KG and 100 M2). The option to display Alternate UOM in MMBE in OMJ7 is not showing.

entry.title: Failed to Open Database connection - SAP CAPM
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am trying to deploy my current SAP CAPM application using the mta.yaml however I see a failed to open database connection error. The reason i see that is that initially i used the default hana cloud database instance but later I deleted the hana cloud instance. Now my space is always pointing to the default database instance and i cannot change that to a different database id. i tried this https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/hana-cloud-deployment-with-several-databases/ba-p/13526994 but no luck.

entry.title: Re: Portfolio Management – Enhanced Financial Planning integration
entry.content:
@Kumaravel03 
as you are aware ACDOCP is the strategic persistency for planning values, so any innovations provided by Finance can only be expected on this technology. Classic planning transactions are still available and can be used for compatibility reasons. I am currently not aware of any planned timelines to deprecate these.

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/designing-sap-build-work-zone
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/implement-and-administer-sap-build-work-zone

plus practical: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/experiencing-end-to-end-sap-build

entry.title: DVM analysis job DANA ANALYSIS
entry.content:
We are running the DVM analysis report in the SAP system and the job DANA ANALYSIS is running long, let us know if there is any other way for running the report paralley.
And do want to know why the report is long running. We could see the job is not in the stuck state and is sequentially reading the data.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: DVM analysis job DANA ANALYSIS
entry.content:
Dear *,

Here are a few key points to consider: 
1. If the DANA collection is activated at DVM@EWA, it can be switched off by upgrading to ST-A/PI 01S SP02 or higher. 
2. If the DANA collection has been activated by the auto DVM service, it cannot be switched off. However, it is possible to perform a manual GSS for DVM at a reduced scope for one table or only a few tables on a regular basis. 

I hope this information is helpful.

Best regards,
Leo
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: No amount authorization for customers/vendors in comp...

willing posting FB60 Document i was getting this error 

Solution : Go in OBA4

New Entries 

Put the amount in document per amount

entry.title: Re: Controlling Area in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check following Help Documentation and it has explained that in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition there is only one controlling area (A000). This configuration cannot be changed under any circumstances. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6b39bd1d0e5e4099a5b65d835c29c696/60bbd07a3b29421bbe3b87c0e1d9cfd6.html?locale=en-US&version=2502.500

Kind Regards

Lucy

entry.title: Stock Consumption of Packaging Material
entry.content:
I have client Requirement that Packaging Material Stock should be reduce when creating delivery/PGI.

They don't want to add Packaging Material in Line item .
How to Achieve this?

Please help

@Lakshmipathi  Please help

entry.title: Re: SAP ASE 16.0 redhat 9 raw device
entry.content:
Hello William,

That will not be possible.
RHEL 9.0 does not provide a raw device module for the kernel. We cannot use devices that the OS does not support even if our product supports it, please see:
Note 3440698 - Support for Raw device on Linux - SAP ASE
Note 2173039 - Device settings and Raw Partitions & File Systems properties for SAP ASE on Red Hat

entry.title: Posting customer invoices in SAP S/4HANA 2023 TM
entry.content:
Dear friends of TM,

When talking about transport management, many people might think basically of the physical movement of some kind of cargo. But when digging deeper in the end-to-end processes it becomes soon obvious how many different process steps are possible or necessary. And one of those is the posting of the customer invoices based on the outbound delivery.

The most known way of posting customer invoices is using the capabilities of SD-Billing, as for example transactions VF01, VF04 etc. or equivalent functions. But from release SAP S/4HANA 2023 on, customer invoices can be posted also from a freight document in TM, allowing a more refined set up of your processes as we will see in the following.

Let’s get into detail about this.

We’re in an outbound scenario where we have a sales order and an outbound delivery. One of those or both are integrated with TM and the respective freight unit is already planned on a freight order.

At some point in time the transport vehicle is loaded and goods issue will be posted which is the prerequisite for posting the customer invoice.

With SAPS/4HANA 2023 we have now the possibility to post the customer invoice from the TM freight document in the following ways:

  • Automatically:

In the freight order/booking type, you have the possibility to define a particular event at which the posting of the customer invoice is triggered:

In this example, you can set up your process that the customer invoice is posted as soon as the transport vehicle has departed from your yard. This gives you the chance to refine your process set up so that customer invoices are posted at a well-defined step in the process (and not only ‘some time after goods issue’).

  • Manually:

You have also the chance to post (or cancel) the customer invoice manually at the freight document. So, transport planners with appropriate competencies can now stay at their freight order/booking where transport execution happens.

 

What is done in both cases functionality-wise is that at first the prerequisite that goods issue needs to be posted beforehand is of course still be checked. And afterwards the regular functions from SD-Billing are called.

Now, when we look at transaction VF01 we see that the user has the chance to enter the following data for the creation of the customer invoice:

  • Billing type
  • Billing date
  • Service rendering date
  • Pricing date.

When customer invoices are posted from a TM freight document you don’t have the possibility to enter this data manually. In TM, we work with the default billing type ‘F2’ and with BAdI /SCMTMS/BADI_LI_TM_SD_BIL you have the chance to change the billing type and to provide the dates (resp. adjust the default dates).

From that, we have a functional equivalence between the posting of customer invoices from a TM freight document or from functions in SD-Billing.

Now, if you can post and cancel customer invoices, you might also want to see them somewhere to check at least, that they have been created.

This is realized as follows:

  • Customer invoices appear in the document flow of TM documents.
  • And also in the document references of freight units.

One remark to the references…you can still do both in a process, post (or cancel) the customer invoices from TM or from SD-Billing and the references are stored as just described.

Furthermore, all functionality described is available with FPS2 of SAP S/4HANA 2023 for the TM embedded scenario but some parts are already available at earlier feature packs of SAP S/4HANA 2023.

Best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Notification to HR when an internal candidate is Crossboarded
entry.content:
Hello All,

I received a new requirement from a client, they want an email notification or workflow trigger delivered to HR when an internal candidate completes the cross-boarding process and is hired for another position in the firm.

There are no cross-boarding or onboarding standard email templates that notify HR when an internal candidate is cross-boarded.

Could you kindly let me know if there is a functionality which will send an email notification to HR during the candidate cross-boarding process? 

Thank you,
Viharika Battina.

entry.title: How can I convert a shortcut to a replica? I need it to export an OOM to another tool.
entry.content:
I have an object-oriented model (OOM) that I want to send to another tool using a Meta Integration bridge, which relies on an XMI file exported from the OOM. The OOM includes shortcuts to classes in other OOMS, and these do not appear in the XMI file. Replicas do appear in the XMI file, so I'd like to convert all my shortcuts to replicas.

It looks like I need to write a script to access the target object for each shortcut and use the CreateReplica method to create a replica, add links to objects in the current model, then delete the shortcut.

Has anybody tried this? Thanks.

George

entry.title: IOS BUILD Loading
entry.content:
Almost 2hr of building IOS APP. any help for this?

also I downloaded the bug report json
{"buildId":"23b3b2ec-90f4-4855-9142-4af7c52f216c","appId":"84376","buildLogError":null}

Other info.

entry.title: SAP Build App Integration Issue with BTP Destination
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am facing an issue while integrating an SAP BTP destination with an SAP Build App. I have created a destination on SAP BTP and attempted to integrate it into my SAP Build App to fetch data entities. However, I encountered a "Connection Failed" error during the integration process.

Interestingly, when I review the data using SAP Build Code, I can see the entity details without any issues.

I suspect that the root cause of this issue is related to Additional Properties in the SAP BTP destination configuration, but I am not sure which properties need to be added or modified to resolve this issue.

Has anyone faced a similar issue? How can I resolve this connection failure in SAP Build App while the data is accessible in SAP Build Code?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps How to save data in draft after button...
entry.content: You could just create an on-device entity -- no need to define all the fields -- and store an object in the entity. The rest depends on what needs to happen next in your requirement.

entry.title: Re: How can I convert a shortcut to a replica? I need it to export an OOM to another tool.
entry.content: A similar question was asked ten years ago, and I suspect the answer is similar today - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-can-i-replace-shortcuts-with-replicas/qaq-p/10779158

entry.title: Re: IOS BUILD Loading
entry.content:
Need help. thanks you!
@Dan_Wroblewski 
@MaiaraEllwanger 
@marihirvi

entry.title: Could not convert from '' to 'USD' on '01.01.2025'. Please provide missing rates for all needed type
entry.content:
Hi SAC folks,

 

Need your valuable input in SAC Planning Conversion issue.

 

 

 

This error occurs when try to create a new report or when adding value to Actual adjustments manually.

Updated all needed rate ,Categories and versions but not working .

There are no records with blank data value for Jan 2025.

 

There is no issue with loaded Actual data for Jan 2025.

 

Details and config –

  • Default currency – USD
  • Currency Conversion table have required currency rate.
  • Dimension with Currency enabled.
  • Single Planning model.

Thanks

Shiv

entry.title: ST-PI 740 v29 does not exist

Good Day 

I am running SUM for an upgrade from 2019 to 2023.

 

The maintenance planner stack contains the v29 of ST-PI 740, however I am not able to find it on software download center. The SAP download manager give an error that says it can not be downloaded directly.

entry.title: Inquiry about Outbound Delivery API in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an inquiry regarding the Outbound Delivery API in SAP Public Cloud.

I am looking for an API that allows split delivery document creation based on a generated sales order.
Is there an API in SAP Public Cloud that supports split delivery document creation based on a sales order?

Thank you.

entry.title: Preconditions required for SAP note 3562336 - [CVE-2025-24870] Insecure Key & Secret Management
entry.content:
SAP note 3562336 - [CVE-2025-24870] Insecure Key & Secret Management vulnerability in SAP GUI for Windows has two preconditions required for this attack:

  1. The user is logged on to an SAP System and has authenticated via username and password. When Single-Sign solutions are used, this vulnerability is not exploitable.
  2. The component GuiXT is installed and active when the user logs on to the SAP System.

For #1, we are using SSO but as admins, we manually login admin account if needed and end-user somtimes required a password reset for user lock/expiration. So, this one is applicable.

For #2, we are not using GuiXT by checking the following:

Method 1: Check in SAP GUI Options
1. Open SAP Logon.
2. Click on the top-left SAP GUI icon and select Options.
3. Navigate to SAP Logon Options > Scripting or Accessibility & Scripting.
4. If GuiXT is installed, you should see an entry related to it.

Method 2: Check via the SAP GUI Status Bar
1. Open SAP GUI and log in to any SAP system.
2. In the command field, enter:

/nGuiXT

and press Enter.

3. If GuiXT is installed, a GuiXT window should appear, showing its status and settings.

Method 3: Check Installed Files in SAP GUI Directory
1. Go to your SAP GUI installation directory, typically:
C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP\FrontEnd\SAPgui

2. Look for GuiXT.exe. If this file exists, GuiXT is installed.

Method 4: Check Windows Taskbar or Task Manager
1. Open SAP GUI.
2. Look at the Windows taskbar (bottom-right). If GuiXT is active, you might see a small GuiXT icon.
3. Alternatively, open Task Manager (Ctrl + Shift + Esc) and check if GuiXT.exe is running under the Processes tab.

 

Since only 1 out of the 2 preconditions are met for this SAP note, do we still need to proceed with the solution? Or it has be both preconditions to be applicable in order to implement the solution?

entry.title: Re: How to add integration flow version to response header?
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks for your reply. I will add this into an integration flow's response in integration suite and now tried to get X-Integration-Flow-Version in groovy script like below. But could not get it from message header or properties. Are you able to tell from which message class I can get X-Integration-Flow-Version?

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message

def Message processData(Message message) {
// Retrieve headers
def headers = message.getHeaders()

// Get the X-Integration-Flow-Version header
def flowVersion = headers.get("X-Integration-Flow-Version")

// Log the retrieved version (optional)
message.setProperty("IntegrationFlowVersion", flowVersion)

return message
}

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Process Automation Data storege
entry.content:
Hello Dan,

Thank you for replying.

I actually want to have access or retrieve the data for end user. I do not want them to disappear.

Your steps of showing how can I find them helped a lot and I really appreciate it. 

Now I need to find a good storage to have end users see the data. Any recommendations? To be honest, I prefer something within BTP and with no need of development. 

 

Thank again.

entry.title: Re: OSS Note 1623235 for S4CORE Release 108

entry.title: Re: OSS Note 1623235 for S4CORE Release 108
entry.content: This is the solution we need to implement

entry.title: Re: ABAP Environment in BTP: Handling API Timeout for Lon...
entry.content:
There is a second parameter to lo_client->execute for setting timeout. 

lo_client->execute( i_timeout = 10 ...

Note: timeout is in seconds, this is only the timeout for the initial delay; -1 is for infinite timeout, this is not recommended.

entry.title: Re: Custom xml file for bank payment in ByD
entry.content: Could you please send the pdf to yan@alfacloud.co.il

entry.title: Re: Custom xml file for bank payment in ByD
entry.content: Could you please send the pdf to yan@alfacloud.co.il , thanks.

entry.title: Re: Enable project for CLT for TDD partner tenant
entry.content: Thank you for the question. The functional restrictions of Configuration Localization Tool explained in detail in note 3107866 are currently valid and there is no feature rollout via this comment functionality to be expected. Best regards Stefan Scholten

Thanks and Regards

Saranya
